Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-18 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long LINC dominates today's ranking at position #1 with an exceptional score of 95.8, driven by extraordinary long-term momentum across all timeframes—posting 1,301.85% returns over 10 years, 506.67% over 5 years, and 158.4% over 1 year, all while maintaining a "strong_buy" signal and passing 4 out of 5 momentum ratio thresholds. The stock decisively outperforms SPY by 140.82% over 1 year and 1,067.37% over 10 years, with all four major moving averages in bullish alignment and a clean momentum flag supported by confirmed volatility. In contrast, FTI at rank #2 shows structural weakness despite near-term strength: while it matches LINC's ratio passes and moving average alignment, its 10-year return of only 218.12% trails badly, and it actually underperforms SPY by 16.35% over the decade, suggesting its recent explosive 5-year run of 640.38% may be a recovery rather than sustained outperformance.
